command:
./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import subprocess,glob
def ls(p): return subprocess.run(['git','ls-files',p],capture_output=True,text=True).stdout.strip().splitlines()
units=sorted(set(ls('runtime_hooks/*.py')+ls('runtime_hooks/core/*.py')+ls('runtime_hooks/adapters/*.py')+ls('runtime_hooks/adapters/*/*.py')+ls('templates/*.yaml')+['governance/copilot-instructions-template.md','examples/multi-validator-contract/AGENTS.md']))
assert len(units)==33
docs=glob.glob('docs/governance/runtime-treatment-census-unit-*.md')+glob.glob('docs/governance/runtime-treatment-census-human-summary-*.md')
alldoc=' '.join(open(d,encoding='utf-8').read() for d in docs)
missing=[u for u in units if u not in alldoc]
assert not missing, missing
fa=' '.join(open('docs/governance/runtime-treatment-census-final-analysis-2026-07-11.md',encoding='utf-8').read().split())
assert 'authorizes no disposition' in fa and 'keep_observe' in fa
print(f'all 33 pinned units named across {len(docs)} census docs; final analysis claim ceiling intact')
"
cannot_claim: semantic correctness of the tested behavior
